name: Tori Taylor
subject: UPDATE: CNN: too close to call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Kathy told you about the new poll this afternoon. I'm here to tell you that a "narrowing margin" is great -- but if we want to turn that into a win, we need every dime we can get. Earl
| | Kathy told you about the new poll this afternoon. I'm here to tell you that a "narrowing margin" is great -- but if we want to turn that into a win, we need every dime we can get. Early voting in North Carolina starts TOMORROW. We need to reach people now. [**We only need another 23 donors to reach our 180 donor goal before midnight. Get yours in right now.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427914/e3b7d3/5eddbe67/25555d38/174303272/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181016pm?refcode=kme181016pm_m") | | | [Donate](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427914/e3b7d3/5eddbe67/25555d38/174303272/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181016pm?refcode=kme181016pm_m")
---
_\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Kathy Manning
Subject: CNN: too close to call_
---
**_"This race is the textbook definition of too close to call."_**
\-- _CNN_ ; 10/16/2018
More good news, team. **Another poll shows us within the margin of error.**
We can win this. I'm sure of it. So are Ted Budd and his special interest friends -- **_which is why they're spending tens of thousands of dollars _a day_ to attack me._**
Let's make sure that doesn't work. [**We need 180 donors to give $5 or more before midnight to keep the numbers moving in our direction. Will you help?**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427914/e3b7d3/5eddbe67/25555d38/174303272/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181016pm?refcode=kme181016pm_m")
The strength of this campaign took this from a race no one had ever heard of to one of the closest races in the country. We've recruited hundreds of volunteers, knocked on thousands of doors, and talked to thousands of voters all across this district.
I'm incredibly proud of the work we've done thus far. But we're coming down to the end here -- **early voting starts __tomorrow__**. North Carolinians are about to cast ballots, and we need to make sure they know the choice they face.
[**We need this grassroots boost today. So if you can, be one of the 180 donors to give before midnight.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427914/e3b7d3/5eddbe67/25555d38/174303272/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181016pm?refcode=kme181016pm_m")
I'm energized by these numbers today. We can win. Let's get over the finish line.
Kathy
| | [Donate](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/65427914/e3b7d3/5eddbe67/25555d38/174303272/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme181016pm?refcode=kme181016pm_m")
---

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: why this matters so much:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | This is it -- tomorrow, I face my final Federal Election Commission (FEC) reporting deadline of my Senate reelection campaign.

**This is the final reporting deadline before the election, and my first head-to-head report against Libertarian Gary Johnson since super PACs pledged $2 million to support him.** Read more below on why this is a make-or-break moment for the rest of my campaign. Or, if you've heard enough:

**_[Help me reach our final FEC fundraising deadline goal before we must publicly report our numbers>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+Help+me+reach+our+final+FEC+fundraising+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6")_**

* * *

Earlier this month, my Senate race was flipped on its head when a national Libertarian super PAC announced it's pledging to spend millions to support Gary Johnson.

Since then, I've been amazed by the outpouring of support as we fight back against dark-money groups and share my vision for New Mexico. Now, we're facing one of our final tests before Election Day.

**Wednesday is the final FEC deadline before the election, and****afterwards****I will have to report my fundraising numbers for the last time before Election Day. We can 't afford a weak showing in the final weeks of this race.**
[DONATE $29 NOW >>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+ask+NOW+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6") I already had a target on my back before Johnson entered the race. I've worked hard in the Senate to protect health care, public lands, and workers' rights -- which is why the Koch brothers launched ads against me earlier this year.

**Simply put: the stakes have never been higher for me, and this is our final chance before Election Day to make an impression.** That's why my team and I are focusing on more grassroots organizing and expanding our ad spending to reach as many voters as possible once early voting starts this Saturday.

**_[That is why I am asking for your support today. To expand our campaign before early voting begins, our new budget goal is to raise an additional $75,000 before our Wednesday deadline. This is my first Senate reelection race, and all our hard work and more will be undone if Gary Johnson or Mick Rich defeats me in November. Will you pitch in now and help us close our budget gap before we publicly report our numbers?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+That+is+why+I+am+asking+for+your+support&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6")_**

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_
**[Donate $10 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=10amp;firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6")** **[Donate $29 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6")** ****[Donate $50 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6")**** **[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=7+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6")** Thank you for your support,

Martin
---

| PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
---
**Help us spread the word by forwarding this email to 3 friends!**
Receive this email from a friend? **[Sign up now to join Martin's team!](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b40e/43d8135f/66095378/5101bea3/3743704941/VEsO/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/footer-join-martins-team?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=8+-+Sign+up+now+to+join+Martins+team&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6")**

Make sure to follow the campaign on **[Twitter](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b40e/43d8135f/66095378/5101bea2/3743704941/VEsP/ "https://twitter.com/teamheinrich?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=9+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6")** and **[Facebook.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b40e/43d8135f/66095378/5101bea5/3743704941/VEsHBQ/ "https://www.facebook.com/TeamHeinrich/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=10+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6")**

**If you want to be the first to know what we're working on next,[sign up for text updates.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b40e/43d8135f/66095378/5101bea4/3743704941/VEsHBA/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/texts?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=11+-+sign+up+for+text+updates&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6")**

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a key part of our grassroots team. If you would like to unsubscribe from these emails click [here](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b40e/43d8135f/66095378/5101bea7/3743704941/VEsHBw/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181016_3_6").

Martin Heinrich for Senate
PO Box 25763
Albuquerque, NM 87125

subject: Never been more proud to be on Team Beto

body:
[1]Beto for Texas

Wow. Did you see tonight's debate? It was even better than the first one!
I've never been more proud to be on #TeamBeto than I am right now.

The contrast between Beto and Ted Cruz is clear. We know where they stand
on the issues that matter to working
families. So now, with just 21 days to go, I'm calling on
you to double down and work harder than ever to make sure we elect Beto
and send him to the U.S. Senate. The future of Texas and the rest of our
nation depends on how hard we fight right here and right now.

with your first
contribution of
$3
right now.

Tonight, let’s celebrate a big win for Beto and our campaign. Tomorrow
morning, we're back to work. We have to win this thing. There’s just no
other option.

Sincerely,

Jody Casey
Campaign Manager

name: Team O'Halleran
subject: in case you missed it: we're all over the news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
In case you missed the dirty, illegal trick that far-right operatives, desperate to unseat Tom, played on our campaign last week... it's been all over the news.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e76/1a8421e1/19a973807/494648e7/1945546133/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Team, **In case you missed the dirty, illegal trick that far-right operatives, desperate to unseat Tom, played on our campaign last week** ... it's been all over the news. _Take a look at the headlines:_ **GOP activists caught posing as communists trying to help Tom O'Halleran** _ - __AZ Central_ **Self-described 'communists' tried to donate to a Democrat. They were actually GOP activists.**_ - __Washington Post_ **Arizona Republicans pose as communists to make illegal donation to Democrat Congressman Tom O 'Halleran's campaign** _ \- Newsweek_ [**CHIP IN to help us fight back against the GOP 's dirty tricks, team >>**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.16_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") This dirty trick confirms that the far-right is so desperate to unseat Tom that they will do ANYTHING to stop him from winning re-election. They're sending their special-interest money to prop up Wendy Rogers _(that 's how she outraised us in the third quarter)._ **Now, we have three weeks left to stop Rogers, and we have one more day to make sure she doesn 't outraise us before tomorrow's FEC deadline.** We've set a goal of raising **another $5,091** by tomorrow at midnight. [**Can you chip in now?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.16_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks, Team O'Halleran | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.16_b2_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****
---

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
** **
** **
** **
** **

Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e76/1a8421e1/19a973807/494648eb/1945546133/VEsB/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/less-emails").

Your grassroots support is critical to helping Tom become a strong voice for all Arizonans. If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [_click here_](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633e76/1a8421e1/19a973807/494648ec/1945546133/VEsO/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/unsubscribe").

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: What our report will show
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
if you contribute before midnight. |
---
| | | | | | | **[Authorized By Trump Headquarters](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d845b58944660486fd9983da9a000a8a787d89a1c0a025af82970248394568675c76e4b9ca794ffc863e5e8339d1cd2977fb560878e6c1aa)**

Friend,

The FEC set the FINAL general election reporting DEADLINE of the 2018 elections.
[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d845b58944660486e275d74d2d14e80dec12858b4e76222e95c0d4ff07ad1200c52f37513d7d4b312373abac6c78606bec257f9789525212)[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=d845b58944660486a13f8cd87844a0ddc6621bc470a440bfcc33df03cafd31c1f7cfa92ac34dac04b73ef444f1e7d4b0af87959f0b7b1aa5)
I expect the Democrats to post big numbers on their report thanks to their Hollywood millionaire donors.

But our report will show how much we've raised from hardworking patriots like YOU.

subject: U.S. Is World’s Most Competitive Economy for First Time in a Decade
body:
| |
---
#
# **_U.S. Is World’s Most Competitive Economy for First Time in a Decade_**
#
Under President Donald J. Trump, the United States is finally back on top “as the most competitive country in the world, regaining the No. 1 spot for the first time since 2008 in an index produced by the World Economic Forum,” Joanna Sugden reports for _The Wall Street Journal_. “America’s vibrant entrepreneurial culture and its dominance in producing a competitive labor market and nimble financial system” partly explain its top ranking, the Global Competitiveness Report says. **[Click here to read more.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE3Ljk2MzQ1OTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNy45NjM0NTkzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAyMDUyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.wsj.com/articles/u-s-is-worlds-most-competitive-economy-for-first-time-in-a-decade-1539727213) ** In [**CNBC**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE3Ljk2MzQ1OTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNy45NjM0NTkzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAyMDUyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/cnbc-job-openings-hit-record-7-136-million-august/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=wwr), Jeff Cox reports that job openings hit a record 7.136 million for the month of August, according to the Job Openings and Labor Turnover Survey. “Openings dwarfed the total level of workers looking for jobs, which stood at 6.23 million for that month and fell to 5.96 million in September, recent Labor Department statistics show.” [**_USA Today’_ s**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE3Ljk2MzQ1OTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNy45NjM0NTkzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAyMDUyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.usatoday.com/story/opinion/2018/10/16/prescription-drugs-price-transparency-overdue-editorials-debates/1662979002/) editorial board agrees with the Trump Administration’s major decision to require drug companies to disclose their prices in TV ads. “The proposed transparency is as welcome as it is overdue. Health care is the only consumer commodity where sellers get to hide the price,” the editors write. “If companies want to advertise the benefits of their drugs, they ought to reveal the prices at the same time and place.” “President Trump’s decision last week to allow the year-round sale of E15 is a promise made and kept to farmers throughout rural America,” Iowa Republican Sens. Chuck Grassley and Joni Ernst write in [**_The Wall Street Journal_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE3Ljk2MzQ1OTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNy45NjM0NTkzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAyMDUyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.wsj.com/articles/trump-gives-farmers-a-jolt-of-fuel-1539730756). “The administration’s E15 action will deliver a timely infusion of optimism to farmers. It will also put an end to an unnecessary government regulation that hinders consumer choice at the pump.” “President Trump is smashing the record for appointing judges to the powerful federal appeals courts with 29 picks confirmed, helping him put his stamp on the judiciary well beyond the Supreme Court,” Alex Swoyer writes in [**_The Washington Times_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE3Ljk2MzQ1OTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNy45NjM0NTkzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAyMDUyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/oct/16/donald-trump-appoints-conservative-judges-federal-/). “For conservatives, the pace of action is a major victory, particularly in the face of overwhelming opposition from liberal activists and Senate Democrats.”
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE3Ljk2MzQ1OTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNy45NjM0NTkzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAyMDUyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE3Ljk2MzQ1OTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNy45NjM0NTkzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAyMDUyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE3Ljk2MzQ1OTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNy45NjM0NTkzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAyMDUyJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)
---

name: Grace H.
subject: Can you help us this weekend?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,
The biggest midterm election in years is less than three weeks away -- and we need your help.
**[Sign up for a shift at your local office this weekend.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ej10AdybwqqFnhpdosWNEHf%2Fg7Pc7Hml)**
More Minnesotans vote than in almost any other state, **but that 's because thousands of people like you do the work of talking to your neighbors about why voting matters and how easy it is to vote.**
There are just three weekends left until Election Day. Can you pledge to volunteer for two shifts before then? **[It's easy to sign up for a shift online.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=AC2j9FFN52wu4Dnse%2FKjXnf%2Fg7Pc7Hml)**
I hope to see you soon.
\-- Grace

body:
http://www.lipinskiforcongress.com/ [http://www.lipinskiforcongress.com/]
Did you see Dan’s message? Our Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline is coming up in less than 12 hours--and it’s our LAST one before the election.
We want to prove that American voters are ready to take the country in a new direction. Contribute $5 now to help us hit our goal [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-pre-gen-fec?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_181017_1_3&amount=5&recurring=auto] or use this secure link: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-pre-gen-fec?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_181017_1_3&amount=5&recurring=auto [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-pre-gen-fec?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_181017_1_3&amount=5&recurring=auto]
---Begin forwarded message from Dan Lipinski---
Hey Peter,
Never, in all of my years of public service, have I ever faced an opponent like Art Jones. He’s a racist, vilely anti-Semitic and a vocal Holocaust denier.
Allowing him to get even one vote would fuel his bigotry and empower him to continue spreading his hatred, which is exactly what he wants.
Our FINAL Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline before November’s general election is tomorrow at midnight, and we need your help to ensure Jones doesn’t get a SINGLE vote by raising $5,000 in the next 24 hours to educate Illinois voters → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-pre-gen-fec?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_181017_1_3&amount=25&recurring=auto]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. Otherwise, you will be redirected to a donation page.
Donate $10 now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-pre-gen-fec?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_181017_1_3&amount=10&express_lane=true]
Donate $25 now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-pre-gen-fec?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_181017_1_3&amount=25&express_lane=true]
Donate $50 now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-pre-gen-fec?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_181017_1_3&amount=50&express_lane=true]
Donate $100 now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-pre-gen-fec?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_181017_1_3&amount=100&express_lane=true]
Donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-pre-gen-fec?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_181017_1_3&amount=25&recurring=auto]
There’s a lot at stake here in IL-03, but there’s even more at stake in races across the country.
Democrats must show historic, united, grassroots support if we want to send a message to our government. This November, we have the chance to change the course of our country, but we all need to step up if we want to do it. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-pre-gen-fec?refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_181017_1_3&amount=25&recurring=auto]
Thanks,
Dan

name: Cesar Fernandez, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: Hey, thank you for believing
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3661/9e00690/50df5e63/240047e0/2693372135/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181017_Thanks_fnd_gq_nopn__CF_ettx&source=em18_181017_Thanks_fnd_gq_nopn__CF_ettx")
Friends,

There were many who doubted this campaign since we launched -- and they told us that this was impossible because Mayor Andrew Gillum didn't have a famous last name, or the ability to write himself a check.

But they underestimated you, and the power of people coming together to support this campaign and this movement.

Thank you for believing in the possibility of a better Florida, for investing in a brighter future for all of us, and for being a dedicated member of our cause. Because of you, our campaign is proving to the state and to the country that it is possible to run an unapologetically progressive campaign today -- and win.

**[So please, chip in $5 or more now and, together, we'll keep on moving forward to victory.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3661/9e00690/50df5e63/240047f8/2693372135/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-october-2018?gpsid=8_55_4483&refcode=em18_181017_Thanks_fnd_gq_nopn__CF_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181017_Thanks_fnd_gq_nopn__CF_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=9+-+So+please+chip+in++ask++or+more+now+and+")**

Bring it home,

Cesar Fernandez

clean_body: \-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- "" Friends, There were many who doubted this campaign since we launched -- and they told us that this was impossible because Mayor Andrew Gillum didn't have a famous last name, or the ability to write himself a check. But they underestimated you, and the power of people coming together to support this campaign and this movement. Thank you for believing in the possibility of a better Florida, for investing in a brighter future for all of us, and for being a dedicated member of our cause. Because of you, our campaign is proving to the state and to the country that it is possible to run an unapologetically progressive campaign today -- and win. "+" Bring it home, Cesar Fernandez Deputy Campaign Manager Andrew Gillum for Governor "" Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor. Andrew Gillum for Governor 240 N. Magnolia Drive Tallahassee, FL 32301

Peter,

Today is the last fundraising deadline before the general election, and we have some good news to report. **[Today, the Houston Chronicle](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2689232/16462849/1520959235?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDJjZTE1OC0yYmQyLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RPK-0MI-zdjPFau9A_bUiU0zVZs2Y_B3dity5sxxX2g=)**[ —**the largest newspaper in the Texas 10th Congressional District** —**endorsed my campaign!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2689233/16462850/1520959235?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDJjZTE1OC0yYmQyLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RPK-0MI-zdjPFau9A_bUiU0zVZs2Y_B3dity5sxxX2g=) The Chronicle highlighted several factors in my endorsement:
* **Our work to protect voting rights at Prairie View A &M**: "Consider us impressed with a campaign that fought for and succeeded in protecting voting rights even before winning an election."
* **Our demands for health care, stronger flood control infrastructure, and immigration reform.**
* **Our rural focus: **"He pointed to preventing rural hospitals from closing and expanding high-speed Internet access outside cities. Overall he's running on a New Deal-style policy and wants to see the return of national public works projects."
* **Our field program:** "Siegel's robust campaign may help turn out voters in areas that Democrats often don't reach."

With three weeks left to go, we've got some great momentum. **[If you have anything left in your political budget, please donate today to power us to victory!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2689234/16462851/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDJjZTE1OC0yYmQyLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RPK-0MI-zdjPFau9A_bUiU0zVZs2Y_B3dity5sxxX2g=)** Thank you!
Mike

name: Bob Casey
subject: PA matters this year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e7d6d/51dbcc2a/10a6622d/3ad0504/4039740000/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") When I ask you to support my campaign, team, I'm asking for something that goes far beyond this Senate race.

Every dollar you give, every phone call you make and every door you knock benefits not just me, but every Democrat on the ballot this year. The support from grassroots donors like you helps fund our organizing program statewide, making sure we get out the vote and spread our message to voters across the Commonwealth.

Pennsylvania is important to me for a lot of reasons, and this year, we have the chance to change history and send more women to represent the Commonwealth in Congress than ever before. And with the court's recent gerrymandering decision, we have the chance to win back _one-quarter_ of the seats needed to flip the House majority here in Pennsylvania alone, so we have to take these races seriously.

**So much is on the line this year, and Pennsylvania can help put our nation back on track. Your support helps Democratic efforts across the state -- can you chip in today and help us win big on November 6?**

Here's the best link: **_[secure.bobcasey.com/donate](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20181017_fr1_v1s2&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Thanks,

Bob

| Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.

name: Jerusalem Demsas
subject: The cost of inaction
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Larry's definition of "too risky" is just wrong.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378a9a/7ab0e2c4/7e1a97b6/34986e18/3410286141/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-oct-mdmn?refcode=OHQ10178A") Friend, Governor Hogan's talked a lot about how Ben's healthcare plans are "too risky" and we "can't afford" that here in Maryland. I want to talk about what we really can't afford: inaction, and the consequences of it. Despite promising to tackle the opioid epidemic here in Maryland when he was running for governor back in 2014, Governor Hogan has stalled. And more than 5,533 Marylanders have died due to opioid-related overdose. This is why Ben's plans aren't focused on a year down the road, or two, or ten. They're plans that will work right now -- and we know that we need action right now. **We need to raise $50,000 for our FINAL mid-month deadline TOMORROW to make sure folks in Maryland know what's at stake.** [**Donate $5 or more now to fund the fight for a stronger, healthier, and more equal Maryland by electing Ben Jealous as our next governor.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378a9a/7ab0e2c4/7e1a97b6/34986e18/3410286141/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-oct-mdmn?refcode=OHQ10178A") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378a9a/7ab0e2c4/7e1a97b6/34986e1b/3410286141/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-oct-mdmn?refcode=OHQ10178A&amount=5&express_lane=true")

Inaction is part-and-parcel of Governor Hogan's leadership, and it's something we simply cannot afford any longer. We need strong, progressive leadership in Maryland -- we need Ben Jealous.
[**We are down to the wire here and every dollar matters. Chip in now to help elect a true leader for Maryland!**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378a9a/7ab0e2c4/7e1a97b6/34986e18/3410286141/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-oct-mdmn?refcode=OHQ10178A")
Thanks,
Jerusalem
Jerusalem Demsas
Communications Director
Ben Jealous for Governor

name: Jason Yates
subject: Get Your Voter Guide
body:
| | The one most important thing you need to vote
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC90LnQIrJoQoXYqjFoj8SFKP3tlrJDu0ifiNHeUIf0jICpiUlNd39gAU-wibZNZPEOGAunzvCvouPNbqx9dmbW4uNCwAlbx56GCHQ9ikAGW_Hw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181017com01&n=1)
| Peter, A handful of months ago we asked, and an overwhelming number of you responded: the single most useful tool you need in this election cycle is a Voter Guide. We know it’s not easy to find basic information about your ballot, and like many Americans, you’re asking: Who are these candidates?
What organizations endorsed them?
How do they stand on important issues? Your input and donations have made it possible for us to answer your questions, and more, with the My Faith Votes’ _**My Voter Guide**_. Our non-partisan _**My Voter Guide**_ allows you to
* access your complete ballot and comprehensive voter guide,
* research candidates’ stances on important issues,
* view candidate endorsements from other organizations,
* save your selections and create your personalized ballot,
* and make a plan to vote; where you choose the time and day you will vote, save it to your calendar, receive reminders, and get driving directions to your polling location.

**You can access your personalized _My Voter Guide_ through our [Voting Assistance Center](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC90LnQIrJoQoXYqjFoj8SFKP3tlrJDu0ifiNHeUIf0jICpiUlNd39gAU-wibZNZPEOGAunzvCvouPNbqx9dmbW4uNCwAlbx56GCHQ9ikAGW_Hw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181017com01&n=2)**, where we also provide essential information you need to cast your informed ballot on or before Election Day. We want to encourage you to use this incredible tool today – and **_SHARE IT_** with your church, friends, family, and neighbors! Remember, it’s estimated as many as 50 million Christians might stay home this election. We need to help Christians in our spheres of influence be equipped with information and then vote! **I challenge you to take 2-minutes and forward this email with the link to the My Faith Votes’ _My Voter Guide_ to your contacts to help them get ready to vote as well. ** When we stand united for biblical values at the polls, we can make a powerful difference in our communities and our nation. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC90LnQIrJoQoXYqjFoj8SFKP3tlrJDu0ifiNHeUIf0jICpiUlNd39gAU-wibZNZPEOGAunzvCvouPNbqx9dmbW4uNCwAlbx56GCHQ9ikAGW_Hw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181017com01&n=3) **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181017com01&n=4) **P.S.** My Faith Votes has [7 different ways](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iaDyqlKk5PWlx-E94LM-jfBRb9Ts_n1mDD4_YawR97Kaj1TEWzMVJUb3eLY7osQZ5u6EAzT_IfOWuSg3fbNKN4E&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181017com01&n=5) you can get involved and help reach other Christians before the elections. Visit our Get Involved page to learn more! _Don't have time to_ _get_ ___involved_ _?_[_Donate to My Faith Votes_](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66idsHszZ_cNjdrkrk6Ct22R4QwDRlm9n2ZoLYrzzhT69I&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181017com01&n=6) _today and support our mission to make the 2018 Midterm Elections the largest turnout of Christian voters ever seen!_
---
* * *
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181017com01&n=7).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=xVQJp8sIg0YIME9Lo-Z4syIdVRw_HYS0jEt2wMUQx2eEuRFK5ZOguLktpeYbxh9N&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181017com01&n=8) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FPXYBx5Xyt4ogPU1qeCocIOlLGlV2jWcvDCbIYySOYm8m4a6nxzoW0Ja2quI4O6s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181017com01&n=9) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=GevmR3RZALWcgxRmRAu8Xs945EaPwemE7bkwg1RsifpjRSkA2HhVJBLM7TbCqLQ4&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181017com01&n=10)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ian=20Todd?=
subject: Tom Emmer was a no-show again yesterday.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY IAN TODD FOR CONGRESS
body:
**
Last night I went to a forum...
------------------------------------------------------------
Last night I went to a forum in Saint Cloud where community member asked questions that centered around care. Healthcare, Childcare, and eldercare and all of the related issues reaching from the opioid crisis all the way to our system of mass incarceration.

These are critical concerns people have about their ability to afford a basic living and raise a family. Here in Saint cloud alone, we have 400 homeless youth who are expected to maintain their grades and participate in school when they have no place to go home to. We also have countless families who have struggled to afford health care for themselves, who have struggled to find affordable childcare and have had to struggle to find care for their elderly parents. Last night Tom Emmer ignored their concerns.

We need our representatives to represent us, and how can they do that if they don't even care enough to show up? I am asking you to donate today (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=noshow2&amount=100&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=ebaad1e18a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_10_17_02_00&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-ebaad1e18a-9291445) to help me replace Tom Emmer so that we can finally have a representative who shows up.

Donate Today (https://secure.actblue.com/donate/iantodd?refcode=noshow2&amount=100&utm_source=Newsletter&utm_campaign=ebaad1e18a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2018_10_17_02_00&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_28710cd7a6-ebaad1e18a-9291445)

" Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" After this final FEC deadline our numbers will go public -- and if we fall short that would tell our opponent and the super PACs trying to defeat us their attacks are working and they can win this race. We can't let that happen. We have to show everyone this team is strong and ready fight any dark money, big donor, or right-wing attacks they will try against us. " Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=" Thank you for everything, Tina

Peter -- We’ve had a lot happen in the last few weeks, so I want to give you a quick recap so you were up-to-speed before tonight’s deadline:

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
Did you see Mandi's email yesterday, friend?

A new poll shows that Steve's down FIVE points to Adam Laxalt. With less than three weeks left before election day, **we need your help now.**

**[Will you chip in $5 now to help us close this five-point gap before it's too late?](https://act.myngp.com/el/WSvmoZSTodMQXZuE1KYi5oJjT2z4yVWIuBf5bUwamUI=/khcE-0SNysvWzuCuYKIPDO1Y63IP88VxYMZeK5HWXMg=?gpsid=37_57_4505&refcode=em18_181017_dn5kck_L1_fnd_gq_act__CS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181017_dn5kck_L1_fnd_gq_act__CS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

Chris Sloan

Steve Sisolak for Governor

From: Mandi Karp, Steve Sisolak for Governor <info@stevesisolak.com>
Date: Tue, Oct 16, 2018
Subject: poll alert (not good)
---
Friend,

Not much time to write this, so I'll just get right to it: Thanks to our opponent's lies and attack ads, **WE ARE DOWN FIVE POINTS** in the latest poll -- with just four days until early voting begins.

We can still win this, but Steve needs your help to overcome the dark money flowing in toward the Koch-funded Adam Laxalt.

**[$5, $10, $20-- anything will help keep our message on air before the polls open this Saturday.](https://act.myngp.com/el/WSvmoZSTodMQXZuE1KYi5oJjT2z4yVWIuBf5bUwamUI=/khcE-0SNysvWzuCuYKIPDO1Y63IP88VxYMZeK5HWXMg=?gpsid=37_57_4505&refcode=em18_181017_dn5kck_L2_fnd_gq_act__CS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181017_dn5kck_L2_fnd_gq_act__CS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

I'm really worried that we won't have enough resources to sustain our grassroots campaign. We can't afford to let Nevada families fall behind, and Steve is ready to fight for us if we can get him across the finish line.

There isn't much time left - please give what you can today.

Mandi Karp
Finance Director
Steve Sisolak for Governor

name: DWS (Congresswoman)
subject: They think they're going to win
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | The head of the right-wing Super PAC _Congressional Leadership Fund_ thinks "things have undeniably improved in [Republican] polling," and they have a chance to win big victories in the midterm elections. **Team -- it's up to us to prove them wrong.** [**We need to raise $218,000 to close out the final month of the campaign. Will you give?**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c81/622b7b5b/1d4b1825/307b68ac/4114128210/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181017?refcode=dwse181017_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Remember, when you cast your vote this November, you're not just voting for a candidate. **You're voting for a cause.** Democrats want to protect the Affordable Care Act, and through it, the millions of people who gained access to affordable insurance. Republicans want to take it away. Democrats want to keep Medicare and Social Security intact for this and future generations of seniors. Republicans want to cut it to pay for their tax cuts to the wealthy. Democrats value women and families, and the issues important to us. Republicans prefer to demean and degrade women, and belittle the issues important to us. **You're voting for the future of our nation this November, and we need the resources to get that message out.** We only have another 20 days to go -- so we need to work fast. [**Get your contribution in today. Help us elect Democrats up and down the ballot.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113c81/622b7b5b/1d4b1825/307b68ac/4114128210/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse181017?refcode=dwse181017_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thank you. Debbie
---

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---

Even more footage was released last night. I have to admit, even I was shocked. Peter,

And then, even more footage was released last night. I have to admit, even I was shocked. Our mom said we could send you all an email because we really wanted you to know that there's still time to wish our dad a happy birthday. **[You can add your name here!](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3660/9e00690/5332f76c/240041f3/841040843/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/wish-chris-king-a-happy-birthday?gpsid=13_55_4465&source=em18_181017_CKbdy2_engg_gq_act__Kids_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181017_CKbdy2_engg_gq_act__Kids_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=2+-+You+can+add+your+name+here")**

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3660/9e00690/5332f76c/240041f2/841040843/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/wish-chris-king-a-happy-birthday?gpsid=13_55_4465&source=em18_181017_CKbdy2_engg_gq_act__Kids_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181017_CKbdy2_engg_gq_act__Kids_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=3")
We've seen how hard our dad has been working so we wanted to make sure he feels special and knows how much people appreciate him.

**[We're going to give him his card tomorrow, so make sure you sign your name before it's too late.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3660/9e00690/5332f76c/240041f5/841040843/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/wish-chris-king-a-happy-birthday?gpsid=13_55_4465&source=em18_181017_CKbdy2_engg_gq_act__Kids_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181017_CKbdy2_engg_gq_act__Kids_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=4+-+Were+going+to+give+him+his+card+tomorrow")**

Thank you!

Charlie (12), Mary Grace (9), and Luke (7) King

[DONATE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3660/9e00690/5332f76c/240041f4/841040843/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-october-2018?gpsid=13_55_4295&refcode=em18_181017_CKbdy2_engg_gq_act__Kids_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181017_CKbdy2_engg_gq_act__Kids_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&noskip=true&utm_content=5+-+DONATE")

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor.

---
Andrew Gillum for Governor
240 N. Magnolia Drive
Tallahassee, FL 32301

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3660/9e00690/5332f76c/240041f7/841040843/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=6+-+receive+fewer+emails&utm_campaign=em18_181017_CKbdy2_engg_gq_act__Kids_ettx"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3660/9e00690/5332f76c/240041f6/841040843/VEsB/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=7+-+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em18_181017_CKbdy2_engg_gq_act__Kids_ettx&source=em18_181017_CKbdy2_engg_gq_act__Kids_ettx"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3660/9e00690/5332f76c/24004189/841040843/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=8+-+You+can+support+our+campaign+by+making+a&utm_campaign=em18_181017_CKbdy2_engg_gq_act__Kids_ettx&source=em18_181017_CKbdy2_engg_gq_act__Kids_ettx")

name: Steve Fitzer
subject: question for you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | I'm running our morning report for Martin soon to let him know where we stand on our FEC fundraising goal. This is our final reporting deadline before the election, and missing it would spell major trouble for Martin...**_[If you haven't already, can you help us reach our goal before we have to report our numbers to the FEC?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+If+you+havenrsquot+already+can+you+help+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7")_**

_Begin original message:_

This is it -- on Wednesday, I face my final Federal Election Commission (FEC) reporting deadline of my Senate reelection campaign.

**This is the final reporting deadline before the election, and my first head-to-head report against Libertarian Gary Johnson since super PACs pledged $2 million to support him.** Read more below on why this is a make-or-break moment for the rest of my campaign. Or, if you've heard enough:

**_[Help me reach our final FEC fundraising deadline goal before we must publicly report our numbers>>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+Help+me+reach+our+final+FEC+fundraising+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7")_**

* * *

Earlier this month, my Senate race was flipped on its head when a national Libertarian super PAC pledged $2 million to support Gary Johnson.

Since then, I've been amazed by the outpouring of support as we fight back against dark-money groups and share my vision for New Mexico. Now, we're facing one of our final tests before Election Day.

**Wednesday is the final FEC deadline before the election, and****afterwards****I will have to report my fundraising numbers for the last time before Election Day. We can 't afford a weak showing in the final weeks of this race.**
[DONATE $29 NOW >>](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+ask+NOW+gtgt&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7") I already had a target on my back before Johnson entered the race. I've worked hard in the Senate to protect health care, public lands, and workers' rights -- which is why the Koch brothers launched ads against me earlier this year.

**Simply put: the stakes have never been higher for me, and this is our final chance before Election Day to make an impression.** That's why my team and I are focusing on more grassroots organizing and expanding our ad spending to reach as many voters as possible once early voting starts this Saturday.

**_[That is why I am asking for your support today. To expand our campaign before early voting begins, our new budget goal is to raise an additional $75,000 before our Wednesday deadline. This is my first Senate reelection race, and all our hard work and more will be undone if Gary Johnson or Mick Rich defeats me in November. Will you pitch in now and help us close our budget gap before we publically report our numbers?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+That+is+why+I+am+asking+for+your+support&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7")_**

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_
**[Donate $10 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=10amp;firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7")** **[Donate $29 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7")** ****[Donate $50 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=7+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7")**** **[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=8+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7")** Thank you for your support,

Martin
---

| PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
---
**Help us spread the word by forwarding this email to 3 friends!**
Receive this email from a friend? **[Sign up now to join Martin's team!](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b40a/43d8135f/660ae937/5101bd87/3030812278/VEsP/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/footer-join-martins-team?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=9+-+Sign+up+now+to+join+Martins+team&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7")**

Make sure to follow the campaign on **[Twitter](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b40a/43d8135f/660ae937/5101bd86/3030812278/VEsHBQ/ "https://twitter.com/teamheinrich?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=10+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7")** and **[Facebook.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b40a/43d8135f/660ae937/5101bd89/3030812278/VEsHBA/ "https://www.facebook.com/TeamHeinrich/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=11+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7")**

**If you want to be the first to know what we're working on next,[sign up for text updates.](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b40a/43d8135f/660ae937/5101bd88/3030812278/VEsHBw/ "https://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/s/texts?source=footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=12+-+sign+up+for+text+updates&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7")**

We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a key part of our grassroots team. If you would like to unsubscribe from these emails click [here](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b40a/43d8135f/660ae937/5101bd8b/3030812278/VEsHBg/ "http://nm.martinheinrich.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_1_7").

Martin Heinrich for Senate
PO Box 25763
Albuquerque, NM 87125

subject: We won't let them tear us down
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Friends,

With only three weeks left until Election Day, our opponents are turning to desperate measures. Since their attempt to push a radical out-of-touch agenda is failing, they are taking it out on our campaign signs.

**They may have gotten to our signs, but we will not let the angry mob tear us down.**

[Will you help us send them a message by ](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=a6ee51b7f3&e=bfe3be83a5)[chipping in today](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=3c7f6b2f38&e=bfe3be83a5)[ to replace our vandalized yard signs?](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=1ff31738f9&e=bfe3be83a5)

Each sign costs $36.42, and there are many destroyed throughout the District. With your help, our conservative grassroots campaign will continue to build momentum and make it across the finish line to victory on November 6!

[Can I count on your support? ](https://jimbanks.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9f5396c0af44767a2db1e30c&id=105d12ff28&e=bfe3be83a5)
Working for you,

Jim

name: Kim Howard, Team Morse
subject: McClintock’s attacks on Jessica are shameful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/SKZ7hggBM8OLQ8ORUboxtPDu5zPmMf8ncw9DlMgLcaM=/XCJAet2bAg8P_3oYqZWLVlsy-Q0u0nsYNN8vVgO9tdo=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_201801017_KH_20181017-fec1_all_logo)
Peter,
**McClintock has gone on the attack --we knew it was coming, but it's even worse than we expected. **
He's spreading lies about Jessica, attacking everything from her decade working for our national security to her political independence. **These attack ads are now airing all over our community.**
It's not only wrong--it's offensive. And it's exactly the same, old, divisive, partisan politics that we DON'T need more of to move our country forward.
Jessica and I are committed to running a campaign our community can be proud of, but McClintock is fighting dirty--and thanks to all his corporate PAC supporters, he'll be able to spread these lies far and wide. The only way we can fight back is with the help of this incredible team.
**Tomorrow is the final FEC reporting deadline of this election --and we need to raise $14,500 before the deadline to make sure Jessica has the resources she needs to fight back against McClintock's attacks. Can you rush us a contribution--any amount helps--to help us respond now? **
[$15 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/SKZ7hggBM8OLQ8ORUboxtPDu5zPmMf8ncw9DlMgLcaM=/dxKt2brRCP_3vVtZdrAc5lOSk2IjOvNMYlx3MgopxJg=?recurring=auto&amount=15&refcode=email_ngp_fr_201801017_KH_20181017-fec1_all_15) | [$25 >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/SKZ7hggBM8OLQ8ORUboxtPDu5zPmMf8ncw9DlMgLcaM=/dxKt2brRCP_3vVtZdrAc5lOSk2IjOvNMYlx3MgopxJg=?recurring=auto&amount=25&refcode=email_ngp_fr_201801017_KH_20181017-fec1_all_25)

Kim

Jessica and I are committed to running a campaign our community can be proud of, but McClintock is fighting dirty--and thanks to all his corporate PAC supporters, he'll be able to spread these lies far and wide. The only way we can fight back is with the help of this incredible team. Tomorrow is the final FEC reporting deadline of this election --and we need to raise $14,500 before the deadline to make sure Jessica has the resources she needs to fight back against McClintock's attacks. Can you rush us a contribution--any amount helps--to help us respond now? | ---|--- | | Thank you for being here when Jessica needs you, Kim Kim Howard Campaign Manager Morse for Congress Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign. Jessica Morse for Congress 1079 Sunrise Ave Ste B 275 Roseville CA 95661 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please=.

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: by the numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
According to recent Federal Election Commission filings, outside groups and Super PACs supporting Rep. Brat have spent nearly $3 million to defeat our campaign. And the bulk of it has funded the negative, misleading ads you see on TV, attacking my integrity and my record.
| | Peter, According to recent Federal Election Commission filings, **outside groups and Super PACs supporting Rep. Brat have spent _nearly $3 million_ to defeat our campaign.** And the bulk of it has funded the negative, misleading ads you see on TV, attacking my integrity and my record. This is what happens, Peter, when you don't have a record to run on and your goal becomes protecting a single seat in Congress, rather than serving the people. You depend on outside groups to save you by attacking your opponent. **I believe people want to vote FOR someone and FOR something** \-- which is why I am offering Central Virginians my plan to make positive change for our community. And with your help, I will make sure that every last voter in our district knows it. [**Will you help our campaign continue to get our message -- who I am and what I 'm working FOR -- out to voters?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/wIbW1ml2CSCnIMoXxntCTrgKyuJ8YC4HqFdOB1nWeBw=/aBwE7ScXFnJ8JGcfHTJOEmdgQH6IIWTyW1YnRWYwtI4=?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.17_b1_as_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) I sincerely appreciate your support, Peter. name: Samantha Maltzman
subject: (personal) The Senator asked about you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
Hi Friend, I just got off the phone with Senator Menendez, and he asked about you specifically.

Your support carries a lot of weight for him, so he wanted me to reach out to you directly. With the FEC deadline today, he needs to know how we are going to close this fundraising gap and prepare for these final few weeks.

Bob Hugin is doing everything in his power to buy this race for Donald Trump. But having people like you, friend, step up right now can be a game-changer.

We set up a private link for you to use so that the Senator can get a notification when your contribution goes through.

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-fecdeadline](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846cec/3af3c5d/3999fcb5/4ec339b8/1139309453/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-fecdeadline?gpsid=5_73_4435&refcode=em18_181016_FEC3_fnd_gq_cust__SM_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181016_FEC3_fnd_gq_cust__SM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+httpssecureactbluecomdonatemenendezfecde")

Sam

name: Max Harris
subject: We just got some huge news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress
body:
Friend,

This is big: the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee just added us to their "Red to Blue" program. It's their way of saying they know this race is neck and neck.

We can flip this district, but first, tonight is the last major FEC deadline of this election. I don't want to overstate this, but we really need to put up some big numbers tonight.

[Can you help out and chip in $5 before tonight's urgent FEC deadline?](https://act.myngp.com/el/v8Q8_w0BqZtcABgf_AuL3L_94dE30zjFxxPF6SzNYoI=/ybMGOG7Fgaf6_xH519E77q-aoeHrB6YdgnuXDKetF-4=?refcode=em181017)

Mel is working night and day, talking to voters across the district.

Here in HQ, we're working to finalize our budget for the last 20 days. Let me tell you, I'm living in a mess of spreadsheets, trying to balance how many ads we can run, how many phone calls we can make, and how many doors we can knock before election day, and it's going to be tight.

When Mel checks in later, we're going to have to make some tough choices, and I want to make sure we have the resources we need to win.

[_**Today 's big news is proof this district is winnable -- but only if we hit our goal before tonight's last major FEC deadline. Pitch in $5 before midnight.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/v8Q8_w0BqZtcABgf_AuL3L_94dE30zjFxxPF6SzNYoI=/ybMGOG7Fgaf6_xH519E77q-aoeHrB6YdgnuXDKetF-4=?refcode=em181017)

Thank you,

Max Harris
Campaign Manager, Mel for Congress

Paid for by Mel Hall for Congress

South Bend, IN 46624 United States

As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please "="._ ** Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

name: Climate Action via jayinslee.com
subject: Sign on NOW: Demand Climate Action!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Will you sign our petition to hold our national politicians accountable?

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bbb1/2f5ea88d/74be7cad/2cbc63ad/2458083924/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/ipcc-climate-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-10-17_mid-month-4&source=ema_2018-10-17_mid-month-4&utm_campaign=mid-month-4&utm_medium=ema") Friend, [**Have you signed Governor Inslee's petition yet to demand climate action?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bbb1/2f5ea88d/74be7cad/2cbc63ad/2458083924/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/ipcc-climate-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-10-17_mid-month-4&source=ema_2018-10-17_mid-month-4&utm_campaign=mid-month-4&utm_medium=ema") In light of the devastating United Nations climate report last week, we're going to need some serious **_CLIMATE ACTION_** to prevent the worst effects of climate change. And that's why your voice matters so much, right now. We've got big challenges ahead of us:
* We must act to dramatically slash global greenhouse gas emissions in the next 12 years.
* We've got to reform our transportation, energy, infrastructure, and industrial systems to become more sustainable.
* We've got to eliminate the unabated carbon pollution from coal-fired power plants and instead use renewable energies like wind and solar.

We can't delay -- all of this has to happen in the next twelve years to avoid utter climate disaster, but Trump and his climate-denying administration in the other Washington are moving in the exact the opposite direction. [**Can you help us demand that they take action on climate, right now?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bbb1/2f5ea88d/74be7cad/2cbc63ad/2458083924/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/ipcc-climate-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-10-17_mid-month-4&source=ema_2018-10-17_mid-month-4&utm_campaign=mid-month-4&utm_medium=ema") | [SIGN THE PETITION »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bbb1/2f5ea88d/74be7cad/2cbc63ad/2458083924/VEsC/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/ipcc-climate-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-10-17_mid-month-4&source=ema_2018-10-17_mid-month-4&utm_campaign=mid-month-4&utm_medium=ema")
---
What Trump and his cronies don't realize is that there are huge upsides to a clean energy economy. Just look at Washington state -- we're the #1 state economy in the nation, the #1 state leader in job growth, and also a leader in clean energy.
Climate action will boost our economy and help our health. We'll see millions of new jobs and more equitable energy access. We'll also avoid hundreds of thousands of premature deaths from air pollution, and we will avert a massive refugee crisis that climate change will bring.
**So what are we going to choose? Extreme weather, starvation, home and habitat loss, and terrible health conditions? Or a clean energy economy that will work for everyone?**
There is still a chance to create the sustainable, clean energy system we need to prevent these drastic effects of climate change. But first, we need our national politicians to put the priority on our environment and our economy, and stop listening to coal and oil lobbyists.
[**It's time to tell Trump to pay attention to climate change. Join Jay Inslee today in demanding that our national governments step up to the challenge of a clean energy economy!**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bbb1/2f5ea88d/74be7cad/2cbc63ad/2458083924/VEsD/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/ipcc-climate-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-10-17_mid-month-4&source=ema_2018-10-17_mid-month-4&utm_campaign=mid-month-4&utm_medium=ema")
Thanks,
Team Inslee
[ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bbb1/2f5ea88d/74be7cad/2cbc63ad/2458083924/VEsA/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/ipcc-climate-petition?utm_source=ema_2018-10-17_mid-month-4&source=ema_2018-10-17_mid-month-4&utm_campaign=mid-month-4&utm_medium=ema")
---

_Jay Inslee is leading a movement to create long-lasting progressive change in America. Now more than ever, we must support progressive leadership in America. Chip in to show you're with Jay Inslee as we fight for progress in Washington state and around the country._

| [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7bbb1/2f5ea88d/74be7cad/2cbc63ac/2458083924/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/climate-leaders-now?utm_source=ema_2018-10-17_mid-month-4&refcode=ema_2018-10-17_mid-month-4&utm_campaign=mid-month-4&utm_medium=ema")

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: President Trump tells his Cabinet to cut the fat
body:
| |
---
The White House • October 17, 2018
## President Trump tells his Cabinet to cut the fat
**Deregulation doesn’t make headlines** as often as some other topics. While Americans can see the results of policies such as tax cuts immediately in their paychecks, cutting stifling red tape across the Federal bureaucracy is a long-term investment in building a stronger, freer, and more competitive America. **But regulation is the perfect symbol** of Washington’s decades-long power grab. “An ever-growing maze of regulations, rules, restrictions has cost our country trillions and trillions of dollars, millions of jobs, countless American factories, and devastated many industries,” President Donald J. Trump says. Now, 21 months into his Presidency, regulatory reform has _saved_ American families and business owners $33 billion. **Compare that with the Obama record** : In his first 21 months in office, President Obama _imposed_ $245 billion in regulatory costs on the American people. **Unlike most politicians** , President Trump backed up his campaign talk with a specific promise, pledging that his government would cut two regulations each year for every new one added. The results? The Trump Administration issued 176 deregulatory actions last year—eliminating _12 regulations_ for every new one. **Today, the President met with American workers** from a number of industries to hear firsthand how these policies have affected them. Here are just a few examples of how the deregulation revolution is making Americans’ lives a little easier:
* The Department of Labor made it simpler for small businesses to provide better health insurance to their employees through association health plans.
* The Department of Veterans Affairs greatly expanded veterans’ ability to use telehealth services, giving them access to state-of-the-art care everywhere.
* Areas off the coast of New England have been opened to commercial sea scallop harvesting for the first time in years—an economic benefit of $654 million for American fishermen.

**Next up** : In today's Cabinet meeting, President Trump **[directed each member](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE3Ljk2Mzg0MDMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNy45NjM4NDAzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAyNDQ5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1052632179648417800)** of his Cabinet to streamline their agency's budget by 5 percent this fiscal year. **[Get the facts: President Trump is freeing Americans from Washington’s overreach](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE3Ljk2Mzg0MDMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNy45NjM4NDAzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAyNDQ5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-following-promise-cut-burdensome-red-tape-unleash-american-economy/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)**
## Another economic record
**Hardly a week goes by** without more good news on America’s booming economy. The latest record: Job openings hit a new all-time high of 7.136 million for the month of August, revealing a strong, active market for American labor. “Openings dwarfed the total level of workers looking for jobs, which stood at 6.23 million for that month and fell to 5.96 million in September,” Jeff Cox reported for CNBC. **In case that weren’t enough** , the total number of job hires also climbed to a new record: 5.78 million. Compared with a few short years ago, in today’s economy, American workers are having far less trouble finding work. **President Trump chimed in** on Twitter. “Incredible number just out, 7,036,000 job openings. Astonishing - it’s all working! Stock Market up big on tremendous potential of USA. Also, Strong Profits. We are Number One in World, by far!” **[CNBC: Job openings hit record 7.136 million in August](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE3Ljk2Mzg0MDMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNy45NjM4NDAzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAyNDQ5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/cnbc-job-openings-hit-record-7-136-million-august/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)** **Bonus:** [**The President is right—America is no. 1 in global competitiveness again!**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE3Ljk2Mzg0MDMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNy45NjM4NDAzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAyNDQ5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/reuters-u-s-regains-crown-competitive-economy-first-time-since-2008-wef/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
## **Video of the day**
**Yesterday, Vice President Mike Pence** and Second Lady Karen Pence visited Georgia to survey damage from Hurricane Michael. Their visit came a day after President Trump and the First Lady visited Florida and Georgia to meet with first responders and volunteers. **“The people impacted by #HurricaneMichael** remain in our hearts. Yesterday, the @VP and I traveled to Georgia to see firsthand the devastation. We spoke with business owners & farmers. The storm destroyed years of work & they still exuded great strength & faith. We are with you!” the Second Lady**[tweeted](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE3Ljk2Mzg0MDMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNy45NjM4NDAzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAyNDQ5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://twitter.com/SecondLady/status/1052563207313903616)**. **[Watch the Vice President and Second Lady stand with the people of Georgia.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE3Ljk2Mzg0MDMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNy45NjM4NDAzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAyNDQ5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OWf9Z-ML9j0)**
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
President Donald J. Trump, joined by Vice President Mike Pence and members of his Cabinet, meets with workers about cutting regulatory red tape | **October 17, 2018**
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE3Ljk2Mzg0MDMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNy45NjM4NDAzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAyNDQ5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE3Ljk2Mzg0MDMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNy45NjM4NDAzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAyNDQ5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&107&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgxMDE3Ljk2Mzg0MDMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MTAxNy45NjM4NDAzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4NDAyNDQ5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&108&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

Join us next Monday, Oct. 22, for a rally with Donald Trump Jr. in Greenfield to help elect Hoosier Republicans in November!

**There is so much at stake in this year’s critical midterm election.**

body:
