| | | I just spoke with Steve, and I want to share the latest update with you.

**On Sunday, I shared that we have to raise an additional $75,000 before my critical FEC deadline. As it stands, we 're still $11,785 from closing our budget gap.**

We need to raise this additional money to respond to the national Libertarian super PAC running ads for Gary Johnson. Plus, this is the last FEC report before voting starts, meaning it will be pored over by everyone -- the media, my opponents, and dark-money groups -- to gauge whether I have the strength to win my first reelection campaign in just a few weeks.

**_[With less than 12 hours to go, we can't miss the mark. Will you pitch in $29 before midnight tonight to help us close our FEC budget gap?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+With+less+than+12+hours+to+go+we+canrsqu&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_2_8&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_2_8&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_2_8")_**

"https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_2_8&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_2_8&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_2_8")**** **[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-2018-fec-deadline?amount=29&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_2_8&source=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_2_8&refcode=MH_EM_FR_30DO_181017_2_8")** **This is the FEC report everyone will use to judge the strength of my campaign before voting begins.** I can promise you that Gary Johnson, super PACs, and the media will be dissecting our FEC report for any signs of weakness, especially since it's the first time I am reporting my numbers since national Libertarian super PACs started airing ads in New Mexico.

One way to prove to them -- and the national Republican attack machine -- that I can defeat both my extreme opponents is to show in my FEC report that I have a people-powered movement behind me.

Martin

name: Ellie Perez
subject: why this fundraising deadline matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Dear Friend,

Today's news that this Administration is planning to go straight to the Supreme Court to get DACA thrown out hit me hard. I'm a DREAMer and the result of this case, if it goes forward, could mean that I and 28,000 other Arizonan's will be deported to countries we have never called home.

And that's why tonight's fundraising deadline matters. We need to elect leaders like Greg Stanton who will restore checks and balances to Washington. [**Please donate now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2azAphtze6pT1GFuPmozAlzkrYiXjsqLuHZKKDHTPKU=/wdShao2rZ1GIyaOCqRGv4Z8nDxzUiZumwfEz4BFMkG0=?refcode=X_101718_ElliePerez_a&amount=25&recurring=auto)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/2azAphtze6pT1GFuPmozAlzkrYiXjsqLuHZKKDHTPKU=/wdShao2rZ1GIyaOCqRGv4Z8nDxzUiZumwfEz4BFMkG0=?refcode=X_101718_ElliePerez_a&amount=25&recurring=auto)

I'm working for Greg because he is brave. Because I know that he will fight for what is right in Washington; and that is what we desperately need, values-based and results-driven leadership.

[**Join me in supporting Greg today, please contribute to help us reach our midnight goal.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/2azAphtze6pT1GFuPmozAlzkrYiXjsqLuHZKKDHTPKU=/wdShao2rZ1GIyaOCqRGv4Z8nDxzUiZumwfEz4BFMkG0=?refcode=X_101718_ElliePerez_a&amount=25&recurring=auto)

Onward,

Ellie Perez
Political and Field Director, Stanton for Congress

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/2azAphtze6pT1GFuPmozAlzkrYiXjsqLuHZKKDHTPKU=/VWi-oQyraqXKammXswrLxjatks5UN_TkuqYbe1bNFUo=?refcode=X_101718_ElliePerez_a&amount=25&recurring=auto)

Paid for by Stanton for Congress

If you haven't been paying attention to the New Jersey Senate race, now is the time. Polls show Marine veteran and job creator Bob Hugin in a statistical dead heat with corrupt, career politician Bob Menendez.
[Wall Street Journal](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=917505c941814c3182e030dbac121c9f&_e=dEF80-gdoo7DhASVZohYY9BktCQBpV_h31YQZ7Vpq2TkLggOVjntW5PC4Ileo3EDpQcWf0ANBwFa4KhcRL4hPmWcpugE9ImuE0NL8zTdZpnh9q6vLs_QoSKKjHFISpg7GiPkvSrOAV3b_dCw1OB2TvPYbb86IJey2NsMZSysnMDjLIogtx-Id9pP1WPSsVH1G0guJ6iv6hAWyPaYYb-YltwGWrDmxtZGjDUIXwNuPYFqijlO0un5vwh4WVXZTP0taxe1T-yEnyKkwfG98_ZCzxjnttw3BGGNjQvO0Ns058m_6Ha0KClcOMi2H_Y7pRmJwk3Y4p8k7YBcep65eIR7UBe5ReXPXqvfzuCad28gxv5rQ296zqyo8DYASkbyY_2m7dlmUNjeIeazm_Y635zLXg%3D%3D) | The Menendez Method

name: Keren, Kaine Campaign Manager
subject: Can you help? FWD: Ad buy cut in Richmond and Hampton Roads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Hey Derek, I'm passing along this note from our digital director, Jess. She asked this morning if there was any way we could find $20,000 more to put in the Virginia Democratic Coordinated Campaign's big online ad push to turnout voters at the end of this month. I don't want to tell her no - so I'm coming to you.

Budget cuts are the reality, but I don't think we can let something as important as turning out voters in competitive House districts suffer. **Can you rush a contribution to our campaign by the end of the day? Jess can use the money put here to get turnout ads live online as soon as today if we hit this goal. Use this link:**

[https://secure.timkaine.com/October](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f103f/3e0906/77e9b7c7/3e37e52b/450820162/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october?refcode=20181017_2_FR_KCD_ad-buy-fwd-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+httpssecuretimkainecomOctober&utm_campaign=20181017_2_FR_KCD_ad-buy-fwd-LDND&source=20181017_2_FR_KCD_ad-buy-fwd-LDND")

Thanks for letting me turn here when we need the help.

_Keren Charles Dongo_
Campaign Manager, Tim Kaine for Virginia

\-----------Forwarded Message-----------

From: Jessalyn Reid
Date: [Wed Oct 17, 2018 at 7:12 am](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f103f/3e0906/77e9b7c7/3e37e52a/450820162/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk2018-october?refcode=20181017_2_FR_KCD_ad-buy-fwd-LDND&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Wed+Oct+17+2018+at+712+am&utm_campaign=20181017_2_FR_KCD_ad-buy-fwd-LDND&source=20181017_2_FR_KCD_ad-buy-fwd-LDND")
Subject: Ad buy cut in Richmond and Hampton Roads
To: Keren Charles Dongo, Kaine HQ Senior Staff

Keren and team,

Adjusted the ad buy plan like we talked about, accounting for the significant $250,000 cut in the budget. The new projected spend on specific voter turnout ads is now much lower, notably in critical areas like Richmond and Hampton Roads.

I think it's really important that we still run turnout ads in these areas for the coordinated campaign. Not only do we need to get Tim's voters to the polls for the Senate, this will also impact some of our most competitive House races that really need high turnout.

I know we cut this money, but if there's any way we could at least come up with $20,000 and put in about $10,000 into each of these ad buys, I know it will directly translate into votes for the Democratic coordinated campaign on Election Day.

Thanks and let me know what you think,

_Jess_

* * *
This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [**clicking here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f103f/3e0906/77e9b7c7/3e37e529/450820162/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/update-your-information?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+clicking+here&utm_campaign=20181017_2_FR_KCD_ad-buy-fwd-LDND&source=20181017_2_FR_KCD_ad-buy-fwd-LDND")

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f103f/3e0906/77e9b7c7/3e37e528/450820162/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20181017_2_FR_KCD_ad-buy-fwd-LDND&source=20181017_2_FR_KCD_ad-buy-fwd-LDND")

Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to re-electing Tim Kaine to the Senate. If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f103f/3e0906/77e9b7c7/3e37e52f/450820162/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20181017_2_FR_KCD_ad-buy-fwd-LDND&source=20181017_2_FR_KCD_ad-buy-fwd-LDND") Thanks for having Tim's back!

---
2001 Jefferson Davis Highway, Suite 909
Arlington, VA 22202

[Unsubscribe](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f103f/3e0906/77e9b7c7/3e37e52e/450820162/VEsA/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+Unsubscribe&utm_campaign=20181017_2_FR_KCD_ad-buy-fwd-LDND&source=20181017_2_FR_KCD_ad-buy-fwd-LDND")

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: The people of the future are counting on us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

The people of the future are counting on us.

In ten or twenty years, our kids and grandkids are going to look back at
this moment in history and ask, “What did you do?”

We’re going to be able to tell them we did everything we could while we
still had the chance. If we do all that we can at this very moment, we can
tell them we won the election of our lifetimes to give them a better shot
during their lives.

name: Phil Bredesen
subject: The last email
body:
| Peter -- I promise this will be the last email you’ll get from my team about tonight’s fundraising deadline. I hope that means you’ll also give me a chance to explain why I’m asking one more time for your help. When we launched our campaign nearly a year ago, very few pundits or Washington politicians gave us much of a chance of pulling this off. They didn’t think it was possible that in 2018’s political environment dominated by hyper-partisanship, a campaign like ours could take on the status quo and win. **They said we wouldn’t have the right poll-tested message, the grassroots energy, or the financial support to compete. Well, thanks to your support, they’ve been wrong about pretty much everything.** Our message of working together to get things done is resonating with Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike. And with just weeks left before Election Day and Early Vote starting today, the opposition is throwing more than just the kitchen sink at us to try and sway this race. That’s why I’m asking: **Can you chip in whatever you can to make sure we’re in the best position possible after tonight’s final FEC fundraising deadline? Team, As you've heard from our team by now, we have a very important FEC deadline -- _our last big one of this race_ \-- coming up at midnight. So our team is in overdrive to make sure we have a strong showing. But you might be wondering -- why do these reporting deadlines matter so much? Well, let me take a minute to explain.
* **After the deadline, we will report our full fundraising numbers to the FEC for the last time before Election Day, and then they will go PUBLIC.**
* When our report is published, Republican groups determined to salvage their majority in Congress will look at our numbers for any sign of weakness.
* And if they see any... they might decide to drop even MORE outside special-interest money in an effort to unseat Tom.

Put simply, team: We must have a strong showing tonight, or we risk making the fight ahead even more difficult. [**Can you make a donation right now, to help us reach our goal, so this doesn 't happen?**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.17_b2_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Of course, it was always going to be important for us to have a strong showing this week. Tom is the most vulnerable Democrat in the House, and this is a perennial battleground district, so we've always been a top GOP target. **But the stakes increased earlier this week, when we learned that Wendy Rogers outraised us last quarter. We can 't afford to have that happen again.** [**Make a donation by midnight if you can -- we won 't make this goal without you.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.17_b2_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks, Ryan Mulcahy Campaign Manager | ****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq42018?refcode=em_fr_2018.10.17_b2_rm_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****

**_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. name: Team Scholten
subject: A typical night with J.D. Scholten and Steve King
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
There are many differences between Steve King and J.D. Scholten, and perhaps the biggest is what they're focused on these days. J.D. spends nearly every day campaigning non-stop across the district and talking about issues that Iowans care about, while Steve King spends his time visiting or supporting far-right leaders in other countries. Last night was a perfect example: J.D. Scholten was holding a town hall in Ames...
... while Steve King was making national headlines embarrassing the district (again) by endorsing a white nationalist for mayor in Toronto. This is from _The Weekly Standard_ today:
And keep in mind, The Weekly Standard is a conservative opinion magazine!
**For 16 years, the only noteworthy thing Steve King has done for this district is embarrass us. It’s time for a representative that will work as hard as we do. It’s time for J.D. Scholten!**
[**_We only have 20 days left—chip in $20 today to help us pull this off!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2697239/16538542/-770304056?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODkxMjgxMS03N2QyLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0ZjIwZjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a_q4VPsxFM4x5rbgvWyRLmVS3f8lglwx4dehJr2MwVg=)
Thank you.
Standing Tall for All,
Team Scholten

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: one race I really need you to pay attention to
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
My friend Molly Kelly is running for Governor of New Hampshire and with just 20 days until the election, she desperately needs our help.
She's not accepting any corporate money. She's relying on grassroots supporters like you for the support she needs to win this extremely competitive race. [**Will you rush $3 or more - every dollar you can - to help Molly get New Hampshire back on track?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc195/2a380d31/31099390/f16c8b/180503108/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0bWsiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MTAxN19NV0g0TUtfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4mk?refcode=e20181017_MWH4MK_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Republican Governor Chris Sununu has put corporate special interests ahead of everyday New Hampshire families, and Molly is exactly the fighter we need to replace him.
As a single mother raising three children, Molly worked her way through Keene State College, waiting tables and delivering newspapers in rural New Hampshire.
Molly knows the value of hard work and has a deep commitment to expanding opportunity for all hard-working Granite Staters.
Molly has a progressive record of leading on important issues like education, job training, the opioid epidemic, and equal rights for the whole state.
Molly can win, but not without your help. [**Please, give every dollar you can to her campaign right now.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc195/2a380d31/31099390/f16c8b/180503108/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0bWsiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MTAxN19NV0g0TUtfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4mk?refcode=e20181017_MWH4MK_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
Thank you.
With every good wish,
Senator Maggie Hassan
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc195/2a380d31/31099390/f16c8b/180503108/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAxOF9td2g0bWsiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MTAxN19NV0g0TUtfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2018_mwh4mk?refcode=e20181017_MWH4MK_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

_Senator Hassan is asking for contributions of up to $1,000 per election from individuals and $1,000 per election from multicandidate PACs. She is not asking for contributions in excess of the federal limits, or from corporations, labor organizations, and/or other federally prohibited sources. _

| | | Team,

Hiking is one of New Mexicans' favorite activities -- that's why I have a special contest for you.

**My team and I are raffling off the chance to join me and Stephanie Garcia Richard -- our Democratic candidate for Land Commissioner -- on a hike in Albuquerque!

[Enter your name now and you can spend this Sunday morning hiking with Stephanie and me! We'll be picking the winners on Friday, so make sure you enter now >>](http://nm.martinheinrich. Martin

name: Tim Ryan
subject: TOMORROW: Pick up tickets to the OH-13 Debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
This campaign has always been about you, which is why I'm asking you to stand with me again on Thursday, November 1st when I will face off against my Republican opponent for a debate. | |
---
Folks, I can't tell you how much I've appreciated your friendship and support over the years. All of the important progress we've made to invest in our communities and build a brighter future for our families could not have been done without you. **I know you've been getting a lot of emails from me and my team lately, but that's just because the stakes in this election could not be higher for Northeast Ohio -- and for our country.** My whole career, I've fought for hardworking families so that they could have a good-paying job, affordable health care, and a quality education. I've lead the charge against bad trade deals that have left Ohio workers behind and forged new public-private partnerships to make sure Northeast Ohio is at the epicenter of a new, technology-based American economy. **We've made great strides, but there's more work to be done. This campaign has always been about you, which is why I'm asking you to stand with me again on Thursday, November 1st when I will face off against my Republican opponent for a debate.** I look forward to articulating my vision for continued growth across Ohio's 13th Congressional District, and a robust exchange of ideas. **If you'd like to attend the debate on November 1st, you'll need to pick up FREE tickets.** Tickets will be available TOMRROW, Thursday, October 18 at the Warren Tribune Chronicle's offices (240 Franklin Street SE Warren, OH 44483) from 8:00AM - 5:00PM. Each person is able to pick up no more than 4 tickets, and they will be distributed on a first come first serve basis. As always, thank you for being on #TeamRyan. \-- Tim [DONATE](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9307/5486deaa/2b49f293/dcf2e39/1316960727/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_oct18?refcode=em20181018_debate")

* * *
Update Email Preferences [Receive Fewer Emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9307/5486deaa/2b49f293/dcf2e38/1316960727/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [ Unsubscribe](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9307/5486deaa/2b49f293/dcf2e3b/1316960727/VEsF/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe")
---
| |
---
# Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| |
---
**Tim Ryan for Congress**
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
[](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9307/5486deaa/2b49f293/dcf2e3a/1316960727/VEsC/ "http://facebook.com/timryanforcongress") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9307/5486deaa/2b49f293/dcf2e3d/1316960727/VEsD/ "https://twitter.com/TimRyan")
Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [clicking here](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9307/5486deaa/2b49f293/dcf2e3c/1316960727/VEsA/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/update-your-information") Tim is one of the GOP's top targets in 2018, and big-money attacks from D.C. Republicans and right-wing special interests could come at any time. The only way we can make sure Tim remains in Congress to fight for working families is through the efforts of grassroots supporters, volunteers, and donors. That's why Tim needs your help. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with Tim's top supporters. However, if you'd prefer to [receive fewer emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9307/5486deaa/2b49f293/dcf2e38/1316960727/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), please click the link. If you would like to be taken off the list entirely, you can also [unsubscribe.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a9307/5486deaa/2b49f293/dcf2e3b/1316960727/VEsO/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe") Usually no one reads this far, so good on you! From Tim and all of us at Team Ryan, thank you!

name: Team Gillum
subject: A message from Florida's next First Lady:
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3679/9e00690/531c0517/24004ffe/3365206737/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_181017_rjaiAd_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&source=em18_181017_rjaiAd_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx")
Friends,

Mayor Andrew Gillum has always put Florida's families first -- and there's no one who knows that better than his wife, First Lady R. Jai Gillum.

She's seen just how hard he'll fight for what he believes in, and how he's not afraid of a fight -- especially with the gun lobby and the NRA.

**[Watch our new ad and hear firsthand from R. Jai Gillum, Florida's next First Lady, why Mayor Gillum is the leader we need in the Governor's mansion -- then chip in $5 or more to help us bring it home.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3679/9e00690/531c0517/24004ff1/3365206737/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-oct-rjai-tv-ad?gpsid=13_55_4503&refcode=em18_181017_rjaiAd_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_181017_rjaiAd_fnd_gq_act__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&noskip=true&utm_content=2+-+Watch+our+new+ad+and+hear+firsthand+from")**

Abrams (D): 46%
Kemp (R): 47% **Here 's the truth:** Brian Kemp is actively working to suppress the vote by holding up 53,000 voter registrations, most of them from Black voters. Meanwhile, Stacey Abrams is fighting to _defend_ our right to vote, and focusing on talking about critical issues that impact voters' lives, like health care, jobs, and public education. This November, we will harness this enthusiasm to turn out an unprecedented number of voters and chart a new path forward for our state. name: =?utf-8?Q?Team_S=C3=A1nchez?=
subject: Protect LGBTQ diplomats from Trump's discriminatory policy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
body:
The Trump administration is giving these diplomats a choice: get married in three months, or have your partner lose their visa. [](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_181017_LGBTQ_EM&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Peter,

It's no secret that the Trump administration is opposed to LGBTQ equality -- but this is ridiculous.

In 2009, then-Secretary of State Hillary Clinton gave same-sex partners of diplomats the same benefits as married couples. A new directive by the Trump administration **_reverses_** that policy.

[**Sign your name to stand with the families of LGBTQ diplomats and demand that Trump reinstate same-sex partner benefits IMMEDIATELY >>**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036689/4ac3d62d/6a1f0260/1ce29dec/699234724/VEsE/ "https://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/s/rtw_181017_lgbtq?source=RTW_181017_LGBTQ_EM")
| ******[SIGN YOUR NAME](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036689/4ac3d62d/6a1f0260/1ce29ded/699234724/VEsF/ "http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/s/rtw_181017_lgbtq?source=RTW_181017_LGBTQ_EM")******
---
The Trump administration is giving these diplomats a choice: **get married in three months, or have your partner lose their visa.**

For many diplomats, this is an impossible choice, as only 12 percent of countries recognize same-sex marriages.

There's no reason for this directive to be in place. That's why Linda is standing with LGBTQ diplomats and their families, and calling on the State Department to change its mind. [**Stand with her and add your voice today >>**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036689/4ac3d62d/6a1f0260/1ce29dec/699234724/VEsC/ "https://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/s/rtw_181017_lgbtq?source=RTW_181017_LGBTQ_EM")

Thank you,

Team Sanchez
**Rep. Linda S anchez proudly serves the 38th District of California. She is the fifth-highest ranking member of Leadership as the Vice Chair of the House Democratic Caucus and is the highest-ranking Latina in Congress. As a mother, union member, and progressive, Linda will always fight for America's working families.** **[CONTRIBUTE](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_181017_LGBTQ_EM&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
---

You can contribute to The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez by [**donating here.**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036689/4ac3d62d/6a1f0260/1ce29de2/699234724/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ls_support?refcode=footer&amount=25.00&recurring=auto")
Contributions or gifts to The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez are not tax deductible.

You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. Still support Linda but want fewer emails? **[Go here](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036689/4ac3d62d/6a1f0260/1ce29de3/699234724/VEsB/ "https://secure.voteforlinda.com/page/signup/linda-sanchez-lite")** to sign up to receive less email from our campaign. [**Click here**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/15036689/4ac3d62d/6a1f0260/1ce29de0/699234724/VEsO/ "http://ca.voteforlinda.com/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages and enter dpwillis67@gmail.com so we can unsubscribe you from our list.

Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
PO Box 59660
Norwalk, CA 90652
---

Linda S anchez proudly serves the 38th District of California. She is the fifth-highest ranking member of Leadership as the Vice Chair of the House Democratic Caucus and is the highest-ranking Latina in Congress. As a mother, union member, and progressive, Linda will always fight for America's working families. "=" You can contribute to The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez by "" Contributions or gifts to The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez are not tax deductible. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. Still support Linda but want fewer emails? ""** to sign up to receive less email from our campaign. "" if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages and enter dpwillis67@gmail.com so we can unsubscribe you from our list. Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez PO Box 59660 Norwalk, CA 90652

Friends - I want to make sure you saw the email Elizabeth Warren sent last week. She's on Team Kelly because she knows that as governor, I'll put New Hampshire's women and working families over special interests every time.
**But Chris Sununu and his right-wing corporate allies are spending big to defeat me, and I'm counting on your support to win. Can you join Elizabeth Warren and President Obama to help me flip New Hampshire blue in November?**

Thanks,

Molly \-------Forwarded Message-------
From: Senator Elizabeth Warren
Date: Mon., Oct. 8, 2018
Subject: someone you can count on
Dear friends, Here's something you can count on when it comes to Molly Kelly: She'll always put the people of New Hampshire ahead of corporate special interests if she's elected governor. I know this because Molly isn't taking any corporate money to fund her campaign. And that's a huge difference from the Republican incumbent she's taking on. But she needs your help. **[Will you help elect Molly by chipping in $5 today?](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a47/d0ce7de/50156b7b/9cdbc38/3902086832/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjA5LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk209-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")** Her opponent's campaign is fueled by special interest money. They're getting what they pay for, too. As governor, he's giving big tax breaks to the wealthiest corporations in New Hampshire instead of helping working families. **[Will you join Molly's grassroots army to show Chris Sununu that New Hampshire isn't for sale?](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a47/d0ce7de/50156b7b/9cdbc38/3902086832/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjA5LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk209-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")** Molly knows the struggles that working families face. She's lived them. Like me, she worked her way through law school. She had to balance work and motherhood to create opportunities for her family - so you know she'll look out for your family if she's elected governor. It's time to elect a new leader who will help Granite Staters get ahead and stay ahead. With your support, we can elect Molly and build a New Hampshire where everyone has the chance to succeed. **[Will you chip in $5- or whatever amount you can - right now to elect a fighter for working class families?](https://mollykelly.bsd.net/page/m/70fc4a47/d0ce7de/50156b7b/9cdbc38/3902086832/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoia2VsbHlmb3Jnb3Zlcm5vcmVtYWlscyIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjA5LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kellyforgovernoremails?refcode=jtk209-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")** Thank you for being a part of this. Senator Elizabeth Warren

Friend,

I have big news for you.

Our race is getting so hot that President Trump has decided to make a trip to Wisconsin.

**On Wednesday, October 24, President Trump will be hosting an official Make America Great Again rally** in Mosinee, WI, in support of my efforts to defeat Senator Tammy Baldwin.
[GET YOUR TICKETS](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0428ba976bfc425b8b7a64ee1a7698a7&_e=Bp2ycOc6CDvDnO_Qch8uH80b_i0eDBQJAgyRIioSLn2tAJZMsi4SsZARWq0dQCQPJLrsdIBC7RFgYqSvQBxUrYZSqkospHyTfgdzWXHesP6jyELNMNyT3rgnZF21oUsnfExyI82lA_F0uOeQ8okFbBfpgPmSswG4fcv7wXi-k471jHzXQKED2Zik15Dfy1L2T86jR_NKzikYc7CvotQ-jjRp3F7G8-6VeNyWSgzIVjCXRdd9bJkjE9ovPGXNrg_ilpgwdO-uTWs3TgpK6oW_weyO3UsTeLEJ7VVwWJVaEqbTkViQ2MWifoL8rfI0ehftP1M6m2AzGL9b-bBjsF06gnSzV6T_FuPDo7p11KO4tqVoqjd418kGgMon-9NJJIqSAGqH7MNEHiPgQDLO8XSdvVamDXg9-jRDmD79pKxo7JWlZlazDUyiAepJPnuDWCZH)

This is huge, friend. It’s the boost we need to continue the incredible momentum we are experiencing. President Trump will surely tell all of us first hand: he needs an ally in the U.S. Senate, and he knows I’m the one for the job.

Tammy Baldwin is dangerous for Wisconsin. She is determined to undo all of the progress President Trump has made.

She wants to erase our historic tax cuts, replace our healthcare system with full-on, government-run chaos, and continue her horrifying record of failing our veterans.

[JOIN PRESIDENT TRUMP](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0428ba976bfc425b8b7a64ee1a7698a7&_e=Bp2ycOc6CDvDnO_Qch8uH80b_i0eDBQJAgyRIioSLn2tAJZMsi4SsZARWq0dQCQPJLrsdIBC7RFgYqSvQBxUrYZSqkospHyTfgdzWXHesP6jyELNMNyT3rgnZF21oUsnfExyI82lA_F0uOeQ8okFbBfpgPmSswG4fcv7wXi-k471jHzXQKED2Zik15Dfy1L22d5BFsk6uA2azCYVQ4PL1AsdKEfXzwkaX0Zy-Li2-PketyW7l71z9wlOJxJ35WBZCmuwpLAqgGbrRuDAPZmacxr4F67AuhktAoSvmfQtpYYvx3aXxDqjSzVzCl-m48FqXkxFTNwASy731G_mTTBgpGsHk4Dj3SJuZ3mbdckrMZDtWJYOq7Y_7IthRPePrU4LDPXwEww2L3dq4aLLjQAipbK41ZueLgYzsroy3TviW0Mg7t9zSjOSo0-H0IJmAH-x)

President Trump is coming to Wisconsin to make a statement. He will tell our whole state loud and clear that six more years of Senator Baldwin would be disastrous for not only Wisconsin, but the entire America First agenda.

I hope you’ll join President Trump and me on October 24 as we charge towards the finish line together.

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0428ba976bfc425b8b7a64ee1a7698a7&_e=RXB9ZVOnaw0sTCd81Zi-YcCNyezSWsMx_P6VbhOWC2BSn9Fm1ZmE3fCFz_uFeSd5bEukPDtbRDU5bz6fLpfsgY8y5lJ9V4nVC1DOH6knPxi1zDO4iIlNGsf0RUODmIQMr8rEJtAbgMnf5ZrAexyc-MyuJzh9Rq5_hy47N6URwgsIARiyp9svJxEqJzxIG-KyiTU_eDn091XXr2JdlnEj6OxhHmszIp1aXvFzEOQN-MA_ffx_e7lkCtVMUqrxWvrJ). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0428ba976bfc425b8b7a64ee1a7698a7&_e=Bp2ycOc6CDvDnO_Qch8uH9zWdIQ_sKmzYftKfX2x--kUAFnEprpVwzDRN_GJdbAHAmf3QMWnEejTL4hHz2c88Ep77OOHdCy3jFIkK5UqRousIW949CQvtrE1W_3nTj-zsReuia5-knUV5zYOdVqawkINY_zkKElDw83cqAx-1-tVFgK3tTT-u510-C6h1Cyl48Tl_G93AwegyUUGSdP4N8ProkdUSHrZaVtrlqBfeqJ-UEFSGwjBvRRk6P7OEPEo7G0Lifjyz6it5TnviD5lmzBj4o6jCIDa7FQ7yyV7MCS0Z6Ngjb3uoVowZZasHnib2qBz5GlV989la9UfXnRFFI4ERMpILxkc3BnltEdK-q3IbpxGovyHoPMr7Gh5kMtB) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0428ba976bfc425b8b7a64ee1a7698a7&_e=Bp2ycOc6CDvDnO_Qch8uH9zWdIQ_sKmzYftKfX2x--kxQ1tE63omJGcawX2tDTKkAnWCo01z9tY6sE-gjYL0xcwa8HKFiOt6CqpdQY6xWR1EBQHySPoo831JhbHiRMtwbEJoHG7l6o5XCXJUjwWahlfjfVLe1c2xh6yg3i19nocna1N4iqpr4QS47shO_d85yjB9czuRpHyx_7fwmj3-SG5sa2oAi13ytmu9PjNvWh0j6hmrHkdzSJKTeQSk_SwDMlFbkrvIHvTxoV8HW0IvZvMSUqVzBlSlfqAextpXxNTy_cCuoIow8nU_Lu55Yn2gKuKa9FuRKIxKfNtF-kWx69cxoSQpizmA28JXdhBdKnXvmbA-gQnHq3po3ttCrCxk) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0428ba976bfc425b8b7a64ee1a7698a7&_e=Bp2ycOc6CDvDnO_Qch8uH5FRetFnODENJt6xISzCNFpbmgkcMyEHAam97nrdhkIWf485e8ftqPLkw6RK9Vf6B6WGE9DRBWE8V7SBJEK2xgrhLnS-JFEr-UGxxnndOKw_IMXL0xvHS_CRMBL2f6Hxj7rWWlw_mg4Xa43CqI4_rnYEiyeDxzlt9HO5zTSYKuoEh_aecaTj1baqXRfRxx4-7mtbQ5ClkZcD0yy3x_UZ_gjOGEFDvBbKoq4PSx3GwaFheSM6lMAjmRqpR9N8Lqa-Bg%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0428ba976bfc425b8b7a64ee1a7698a7&_e=Bp2ycOc6CDvDnO_Qch8uHyohUknz5fdNZ2-vPBcuSaYlg0t5CZoTg3d4F5lAqgfB2GWMHCal7sD0qos7-9pjdW4tQHbhtnkpQfq9vKq8jK4rd4djN4RusuEMnrZEIP4-FQWf5DD-zGe9EohaXv_8QLOcRJuBo5qkD3vEEy7NZ7IUJDnzWBy7cGNXFcAii3Pdk1tIYItCtbi2clAHnjiRuJHZjjPKVgAqEceANpeA93AP9yY2Ix-xgGWh4i1NT4hPOqFMMv1godzond_mXhM7nw%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0428ba976bfc425b8b7a64ee1a7698a7&_e=Bp2ycOc6CDvDnO_Qch8uH9Qie-2ve9X4w0aYoFsVVXDEOeiGiSKLGtr4E7qLOAaA4Fau5LTcZwAWZvUbVP6qFyZKbBMFR29FB4yPLQ5v-JNUuOU5aADJicz64cSejfrXnUoNmJ9MaO9-7ly5Gq1qsMeE6Aip2bqu9fOve9yjDc0QYVGsGRj1uTojdY0ndZW-J3ByED21u1oyHMXXaLnLWkX0eY4nfuQngZruU6pkz_CEnbogiAZwQbImIwc0SHq-9i5pqBCBxrA8ODdNZI8Gbg%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. clean_body: I have big news for you. Our race is getting so hot that President Trump has decided to make a trip to Wisconsin. Friend, I have big news for you. Our race is getting so hot that President Trump has decided to make a trip to Wisconsin. On Wednesday, October 24, President Trump will be hosting an official Make America Great Again rally in Mosinee, WI, in support of my efforts to defeat Senator Tammy Baldwin. This is huge, friend. It’s the boost we need to continue the incredible momentum we are experiencing. President Trump will surely tell all of us first hand: he needs an ally in the U.S. Senate, and he knows I’m the one for the job. Tammy Baldwin is dangerous for Wisconsin. She is determined to undo all of the progress President Trump has made. She wants to erase our historic tax cuts, replace our healthcare system with full-on, government-run chaos, and continue her horrifying record of failing our veterans. President Trump is coming to Wisconsin to make a statement. He will tell our whole state loud and clear that six more years of Senator Baldwin would be disastrous for not only Wisconsin, but the entire America First agenda. I hope you’ll join President Trump and me on October 24 as we charge towards the finish line together. Get your tickets now: I’ll see you there! Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate
